options.name: -gds_files
options.description: List of GDSII files that need to be translated.

options.name: -gen_script_only
options.description: Generate just the SKILL script that can be given to the abstract tool, but do not execute it.

options.name: -lib_files
options.description: Liberty (.lib) files can also be used to define pin directions by using the direction from the matching .lib cell and pin names.

options.name: -output_lef_file
options.description: Output lef file name that will have the LEF macro abstracts but not technology file information.

options.name: -run_script_only
options.description: Do not re-generate the script but just execute it.

options.name: -verilog_stub_files
options.description: Can be used to define the pin directions by using the direction from the matching Verilog module and pin names.
